NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER TO DISMISS PLAINTIFF SCOTT DUONG'S COMPLAINT FOR FAILURE TO OBEY THIS COURT'S PRIOR ORDER AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT MODIE, DOUG HEARING SET FOR SEP-27-2004 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF DAT AI MA APPEARING IN PRO PER AND DID NOT NOTIFY DEFENDANT. THE COURT ORDERED DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO DISMISS PLAINTIFF SCOTT DUONG'S COMPLAINT FOR FAILURE TO OBEY THIS COURT'S PRIOR ORDER AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS CONTINUED FROM SEP-27-2004 TO OCT-01-2004, 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 610. (610/BCHAN)

DISCOVERY 610, B. TIMOTHY MURPHY, ESQ. FOR MOVING PARTY/DEFENDANT DOUG MODIE. (TENTATIVE RULING)IF PLAINTIFF DUONG FAILS TO APPEAR, HAVING PREVIOUSLY BEEN IN COURT ON SEPTEMBER 27, 2004 AND ORDERED TO PERSONALLY APPEAR, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DISMISS PLAINTIFF DUONG'S COMPLAINT FOR FAILING TO OBEY PRIOR COURT ORDERS IS GRANTED. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF SCOTT DUONG FAILED TO APPEAR. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
